causal_events.theory_claim: Sector relative strength Z-score remains strong (>1.5 AND <2.5) due to FII selling and volatility compression, driving delivery exhaustion (>50 AND <60 WHEN FII_SELLING IS HIGH).
causal_events.attribution_reasoning:
The theory states that when the Sector Relative Strength Z-score remains strong (>1.5 AND <2.5) due to FII selling and volatility compression, it should lead to delivery exhaustion (>50 AND <60 WHEN FII_SELLING IS HIGH). However, in this case, the observations contradict this theory.
